_comment: US + Canada Costco warehouses, geocoded 2026-07-07 from the owner-provided address list. US: US Census Bureau geocoder (public domain). Remainder + Canada: Nominatim / OpenStreetMap (ODbL - attribution shown in Settings). 'approx: true' = city-level accuracy only. GB stores excluded (US/CA focus). Refresh at app updates; never fetch at runtime.
